TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_buya
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: masang nani yau usiq sunis 'nay atu wasuna kinawsa nani.
S.PHON: masaŋ nani jau usiq sunis ʔnaj atu wasuna kinawsa nani.
S.FORM: masang nani yau usiq sunis 'nay atu wasuna kinawsa nani.
S.PHON: masaŋ nani jau usiq sunis ʔnaj atu wasuna kinawsa nani.
S.TRANSL: 從前,有一個小孩和他的狗.
Long time ago, there are a child and his dog.

S.FORM: yau niquduanna tu tu biat pizianna tapeRaskuan.
S.PHON: jau niquɮuanna tu tu βiat piz~rianna tapəʁaskuan.
S.FORM: yau niquduanna tu tu biat pizianna tapeRaskuan.
S.PHON: jau niquɮuanna tu tu βiat piz~rianna tapəʁaskuan.
S.TRANSL: 他有養一隻青蛙,放在瓶子裡.
He keeps a frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: eN maynep qaniyau tuRabi nani maynepti nani.
S.PHON: ən majnəp qanijau tuʁaβi nani majnəpti nani.
S.FORM: eN maynep qaniyau tuRabi nani maynepti nani.
S.PHON: ən majnəp qanijau tuʁaβi nani majnəpti nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們晚上睡覺.
They sleep at night.

S.FORM: 'nay biat 'nay paqanasti mzukat tapeRaskuan mRaRiw.
S.PHON: ʔnaj βiat ʔnaj paqanasti mz~rukat tapəʁaskuan mʁaʁiw.
S.FORM: 'nay biat 'nay paqanasti mzukat tapeRaskuan mRaRiw.
S.PHON: ʔnaj βiat ʔnaj paqanasti mz~rukat tapəʁaskuan mʁaʁiw.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙慢慢地從瓶子裡跑了出來.

TRANSL.notes: That frog slowly (jumps) out of the bottle and runs away.

S.TRANSL: That frog slowly out of the bottle and runs away.

S.FORM: Ramneng sunis 'nay atu wasuna nani.
S.PHON: ʁamnəŋ sunis ʔnaj atu wasuna nani.
S.FORM: Ramneng sunis 'nay atu wasuna nani.
S.PHON: ʁamnəŋ sunis ʔnaj atu wasuna nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子跟他的狗醒了.
The child and his dog wake up.

S.FORM: maiti biat 'nay.
S.PHON: maiti βiat ʔnaj.
S.FORM: maiti biat 'nay.
S.PHON: maiti βiat ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙不見了.
The frog has disappeared.

S.FORM: pamengti kmikikilim qaniyau atu wasuna.
S.PHON: paməŋti kmikikirim qanijau atu wasuna.
S.FORM: pamengti kmikikilim qaniyau atu wasuna.
S.PHON: paməŋti kmikikirim qanijau atu wasuna.
S.TRANSL: 他們跟他的狗一直找一直找.

TRANSL.notes: They and his dog keep looking for (the frog).

S.TRANSL: They and his dog keep looking for .

S.FORM: tanian kikilimanna mai.
S.PHON: tanian kikirimanna mai.
S.FORM: tanian kikilimanna mai.
S.PHON: tanian kikirimanna mai.
S.TRANSL: 到處找都找不著.
They cannot find it anywhere.

S.FORM: nani wasu 'nay nani pasusuRanna ta peRaskuan quRuna nani.
S.PHON: nani wasu ʔnaj nani pasusuʁanna ta pəʁaskuan quʁuna nani.
S.FORM: nani wasu 'nay nani pasusuRanna ta peRaskuan quRuna nani.
S.PHON: nani wasu ʔnaj nani pasusuʁanna ta pəʁaskuan quʁuna nani.
S.TRANSL: 那條狗把頭鑽到瓶子裡去了.
The dog puts his head in the bottle.

S.FORM: pasa sa dengat qaniyau qmqeRas mai nani.
S.PHON: pasa sa ɮəŋat qanijau qmqəʁas mai nani.
S.FORM: pasa sa dengat qaniyau qmqeRas mai nani.
S.PHON: pasa sa ɮəŋat qanijau qmqəʁas mai nani.
S.TRANSL: 跑到窗戶那邊叫,結果沒有.
They go towards the window and call the frog, but it is not there.

S.FORM: wasu 'nay tmuqaz tadengatan naqunian tmibuqti nani.
S.PHON: wasu ʔnaj tmuqaz~r taɮəŋatan naqunian tmiβuqti nani.
S.FORM: wasu 'nay tmuqaz tadengatan naqunian tmibuqti nani.
S.PHON: wasu ʔnaj tmuqaz~r taɮəŋatan naqunian tmiβuqti nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗爬到窗戶上,不知怎樣就掉下來了.
The dog climbs up to the window and somehow it falls.

S.FORM: mabedung peRasku 'nay qumnut s 'nay lazat 'nay 'nay zana lazatna nani.
S.PHON: maβəɮuŋ pəʁasku ʔnaj qumnut s ʔnaj raz~rat ʔnaj ʔnaj z~rana raz~ratna nani.
S.FORM: mabedung peRasku 'nay qumnut s 'nay lazat 'nay 'nay zana lazatna nani.
S.PHON: maβəɮuŋ pəʁasku ʔnaj qumnut s ʔnaj raz~rat ʔnaj ʔnaj z~rana raz~ratna nani.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子破了,小孩很生氣.
The bottle is broken, so the child is angry.

S.FORM: supaR qaya wasu 'nay pmupuk tu lazatna tu zana nani.
S.PHON: supaʁ qaja wasu ʔnaj pmupuk tu raz~ratna tu z~rana nani.
S.FORM: supaR qaya wasu 'nay pmupuk tu lazatna tu zana nani.
S.PHON: supaʁ qaja wasu ʔnaj pmupuk tu raz~ratna tu z~rana nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗也很體貼,安慰牠的主人.
The dog knows his master is angry, so the dog comforts him.

S.FORM: sidamannati.
S.PHON: siɮamannati.
S.FORM: sidamannati.
S.PHON: siɮamannati.

TRANSL.notes: 狗舔了(小孩).

S.TRANSL: 狗舔了 .

TRANSL.notes: It licks (the child).

S.TRANSL: It licks .

S.FORM: nani mzukat qaniyau sa tati.
S.PHON: nani mz~rukat qanijau sa tati.
S.FORM: nani mzukat qaniyau sa tati.
S.PHON: nani mz~rukat qanijau sa tati.
S.TRANSL: 他們出去到外面.
Then they go outside.

S.FORM: ta nani tazian ta papaRinan mazmun mwaza paRin tayan nani.
S.PHON: ta nani taz~rian ta papaʁinan maz~rmun mwaz~ra paʁin tajan nani.
S.FORM: ta nani tazian ta papaRinan mazmun mwaza paRin tayan nani.
S.PHON: ta nani taz~rian ta papaʁinan maz~rmun mwaz~ra paʁin tajan nani.
S.TRANSL: 在樹林那裡裡邊兒有很多樹.
There are lots of trees in the forest.

S.FORM: pasi yau tayan 'nay biat 'nay zinsu nani.
S.PHON: pasi jau tajan ʔnaj βiat ʔnaj z~rinsu nani.
S.FORM: pasi yau tayan 'nay biat 'nay zinsu nani.
S.PHON: pasi jau tajan ʔnaj βiat ʔnaj z~rinsu nani.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙可能就在那裡.
The frog might be there.

S.FORM: kmilim tayan nani.
S.PHON: kmirim tajan nani.
S.FORM: kmilim tayan nani.
S.PHON: kmirim tajan nani.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)在那裡找.

S.TRANSL: 在那裡找.
They look for the frog there.

S.FORM: titaanna yau penay 'nay nani.
S.PHON: titaanna jau pənaj ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: titaanna yau penay 'nay nani.
S.PHON: titaanna jau pənaj ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到蜜蜂.
They saw bees.

S.FORM: sinunungan penay 'nay maseq tazian takinilanna nani.
S.PHON: sinunuŋan pənaj ʔnaj masəq taz~rian takiniranna nani.
S.FORM: sinunungan penay 'nay maseq tazian takinilanna nani.
S.PHON: sinunuŋan pənaj ʔnaj masəq taz~rian takiniranna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們順著蜜蜂走,到了蜜蜂的旁邊.
They follow the bees and arrive somewhere next to the bees.

S.FORM: yau takinilanna yau 'nay 'nay tangan 'nay nani papankedanna.
S.PHON: jau takiniranna jau ʔnaj ʔnaj taŋan ʔnaj nani papankəɮanna.
S.FORM: yau takinilanna yau 'nay 'nay tangan 'nay nani papankedanna.
S.PHON: jau takiniranna jau ʔnaj ʔnaj taŋan ʔnaj nani papankəɮanna.
S.TRANSL: 在蜂窩旁邊有個洞,他往洞裡望一望.
There is a hole near the beehive, so he takes a look into it.

S.FORM: papankedanna kmikilim tayan nani qmRas nani.
S.PHON: papankəɮanna kmikirim tajan nani qmʁas nani.
S.FORM: papankedanna kmikilim tayan nani qmRas nani.
S.PHON: papankəɮanna kmikirim tajan nani qmʁas nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他往洞口裡望一望,在那裡找,叫(那隻青蛙).

S.TRANSL: 他往洞口裡望一望,在那裡找,叫 .
He takes a look into the hole, looking for the frog, and calls it.

S.FORM: mai.
S.PHON: mai.
S.FORM: mai.
S.PHON: mai.
S.TRANSL: 沒有.
Nothing is there.

S.FORM: wasu 'nay nani naquni smangi nani uutuzannati 'nay iza 'nay 'nay penay 'nay nani.
S.PHON: wasu ʔnaj nani naquni smaŋi nani uutuz~rannati ʔnaj iz~ra ʔnaj ʔnaj pənaj ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: wasu 'nay nani naquni smangi nani uutuzannati 'nay iza 'nay 'nay penay 'nay nani.
S.PHON: wasu ʔnaj nani naquni smaŋi nani uutuz~rannati ʔnaj iz~ra ʔnaj ʔnaj pənaj ʔnaj nani.

TRANSL.notes: 那隻狗不知道怎麼搞的,就搖(樹).

S.TRANSL: 那隻狗不知道怎麼搞的,就搖 .
Somehow, the dog shakes the tree.

S.FORM: tmibuqti penay 'nay.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti pənaj ʔnaj.
S.FORM: tmibuqti penay 'nay.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti pənaj ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 蜂窩掉下來了.
The beehive falls.

S.FORM: 'nay ni Rupu izana 'nay Rupu 'nay ninu zintati 'nay izana 'nay Rupuna qaniyau ya.
S.PHON: ʔnaj ni ʁupu iz~rana ʔnaj ʁupu ʔnaj ninu z~rintati ʔnaj iz~rana ʔnaj ʁupuna qanijau ja.
S.FORM: 'nay ni Rupu izana 'nay Rupu 'nay ninu zintati 'nay izana 'nay Rupuna qaniyau ya.
S.PHON: ʔnaj ni ʁupu iz~rana ʔnaj ʁupu ʔnaj ninu z~rintati ʔnaj iz~rana ʔnaj ʁupuna qanijau ja.
S.TRANSL: 不知道要怎麼說 ... ... 那個他們的蜂窩就掉下來了.
That ... that ... that ... beehive ... how should I put it ... their beehive falls.

S.FORM: tmibuqti 'nay nani tmanuzti tuliq 'nay sayza nani.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ʔnaj nani tmanuz~rti turiq ʔnaj sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: tmibuqti 'nay nani tmanuzti tuliq 'nay sayza nani.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ʔnaj nani tmanuz~rti turiq ʔnaj sajz~ra nani.

TRANSL.notes: (蜂窩)掉下來,那些虎頭蜂就追.

S.TRANSL: 掉下來,那些虎頭蜂就追.

TRANSL.notes: That (hive) falls, and the wasps chase (them).

S.TRANSL: That falls, and the wasps chase .

S.FORM: kuli kulikuzanna 'nay ya 'nay wasu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: kuri kurikuz~ranna ʔnaj ja ʔnaj wasu ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: kuli kulikuzanna 'nay ya 'nay wasu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: kuri kurikuz~ranna ʔnaj ja ʔnaj wasu ʔnaj nani.

TRANSL.notes: (蜜蜂)跟在那隻狗後面追.

S.TRANSL: 跟在那隻狗後面追.
The bees chase the dog.

S.FORM: lazatna nani yau tayan ta tmita tu tangan nani.
S.PHON: raz~ratna nani jau tajan ta tmita tu taŋan nani.
S.FORM: lazatna nani yau tayan ta tmita tu tangan nani.
S.PHON: raz~ratna nani jau tajan ta tmita tu taŋan nani.

TRANSL.notes: (狗的)主人看到那裡有個洞.

S.TRANSL: 主人看到那裡有個洞.
That person sees a hole there.

S.FORM: mzukat qaya 'nay adam Raya nani.
S.PHON: mz~rukat qaja ʔnaj aɮam ʁaja nani.
S.FORM: mzukat qaya 'nay adam Raya nani.
S.PHON: mz~rukat qaja ʔnaj aɮam ʁaja nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻大鳥也出來了.
The big bird flies out too.

S.FORM: suzitanti talibeng adam buR 'nay wasuna nani yauti 'nay 'nay penay tmanuz sa nanaung nani.
S.PHON: suz~ritanti tariβəŋ aɮam βuʁ ʔnaj wasuna nani jauti ʔnaj ʔnaj pənaj tmanuz~r sa nanauŋ nani.
S.FORM: suzitanti talibeng adam buR 'nay wasuna nani yauti 'nay 'nay penay tmanuz sa nanaung nani.
S.PHON: suz~ritanti tariβəŋ aɮam βuʁ ʔnaj wasuna nani jauti ʔnaj ʔnaj pənaj tmanuz~r sa nanauŋ nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子往後翻了下來,被蜜蜂追到深山裡去.
The child falls backwards, and the bees keep chasing in the mountain.

S.FORM: Raylikuz.
S.PHON: ʁajrikuz~r.
S.FORM: Raylikuz.
S.PHON: ʁajrikuz~r.
S.TRANSL: 最後.
Finally.

S.FORM: tuqazpaiku kmikilim zinna nani tuqazannati 'nay z 'nay 'nay suRna nani.
S.PHON: tuqaz~rpaiku kmikirim z~rinna nani tuqaz~rannati ʔnaj z~r ʔnaj ʔnaj suʁna nani.
S.FORM: tuqazpaiku kmikilim zinna nani tuqazannati 'nay z 'nay 'nay suRna nani.
S.PHON: tuqaz~rpaiku kmikirim z~rinna nani tuqaz~rannati ʔnaj z~r ʔnaj ʔnaj suʁna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他說:「我要爬上去找青蛙.」就爬到那個冰塊上面去了.
He says, 'I will climb up to look for the frog.' And he climbs up onto the ice.

S.FORM: sa waki 'nay mimet paRin 'nay tababaw zinna sayza nani.
S.PHON: sa waki ʔnaj mimət paʁin ʔnaj taβaβaw z~rinna sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: sa waki 'nay mimet paRin 'nay tababaw zinna sayza nani.
S.PHON: sa waki ʔnaj mimət paʁin ʔnaj taβaβaw z~rinna sajz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: 他以為是樹枝就把它抓住.

TRANSL.notes: He thinks the thing above (the stone) is a tree, so he grasps it.

S.TRANSL: He thinks the thing above is a tree, so he grasps it.

S.FORM: ta na na tmeqez nani mzukatti nani quRuna na iza na siRmuq.
S.PHON: ta na na tməqəz~r nani mz~rukatti nani quʁuna na iz~ra na siʁmuq.
S.FORM: ta na na tmeqez nani mzukatti nani quRuna na iza na siRmuq.
S.PHON: ta na na tməqəz~r nani mz~rukatti nani quʁuna na iz~ra na siʁmuq.

TRANSL.notes: (結果)鹿的頭跑出來.

S.TRANSL: 鹿的頭跑出來.
The head of the deer comes out.

S.FORM: muRetut siRm siRmuq 'nay sayza nani wiyati mRaRiw nani.
S.PHON: muʁətut siʁm siʁmuq ʔnaj sajz~ra nani wijati mʁaʁiw nani.
S.FORM: muRetut siRm siRmuq 'nay sayza nani wiyati mRaRiw nani.
S.PHON: muʁətut siʁm siʁmuq ʔnaj sajz~ra nani wijati mʁaʁiw nani.
S.TRANSL: 鹿嚇了一跳,就跑了.
The deer is frightened, so it runs.

S.FORM: maseq taqidisan tmeqez nani.
S.PHON: masəq taqiɮisan tməqəz~r nani.
S.FORM: maseq taqidisan tmeqez nani.
S.PHON: masəq taqiɮisan tməqəz~r nani.
S.TRANSL: 到了懸崖邊就停了下來.

TRANSL.notes: (The deer) stops at the cliff.

S.TRANSL: stops at the cliff.

S.FORM: tmibuqti 'nay qaniyau 'nay sunis 'nay atu wasuna uh nani.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ʔnaj qanijau ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj atu wasuna uh nani.
S.FORM: tmibuqti 'nay qaniyau 'nay sunis 'nay atu wasuna uh nani.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ʔnaj qanijau ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj atu wasuna uh nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩跟他的狗掉了下來.

TRANSL.notes: The child and the dog fall (from the cliff).

S.TRANSL: The child and the dog fall .

S.FORM: qanasti tmuqaz muman az nani.
S.PHON: qanasti tmuqaz~r muman az~r nani.
S.FORM: qanasti tmuqaz muman az nani.
S.PHON: qanasti tmuqaz~r muman az~r nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們又慢慢地重新爬了起來.
They slowly climb up again.

S.FORM: supaR sayza mnangwi nani waw.
S.PHON: supaʁ sajz~ra mnaŋwi nani waw.
S.FORM: supaR sayza mnangwi nani waw.
S.PHON: supaʁ sajz~ra mnaŋwi nani waw.
S.TRANSL: 他們會游泳.
They can swim.

S.FORM: qangiti yauti tapaRinan sayza na qaniyau sa.
S.PHON: qaŋiti jauti tapaʁinan sajz~ra na qanijau sa.
S.FORM: qangiti yauti tapaRinan sayza na qaniyau sa.
S.PHON: qaŋiti jauti tapaʁinan sajz~ra na qanijau sa.
S.TRANSL: 還好,那裡有樹.
Fortunately, there is a trunk.

S.FORM: zaqisanna sa azuti syulin 'nay zinta na nani.
S.PHON: z~raqisanna sa az~ruti sjurin ʔnaj z~rinta na nani.
S.FORM: zaqisanna sa azuti syulin 'nay zinta na nani.
S.PHON: z~raqisanna sa az~ruti sjurin ʔnaj z~rinta na nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩覺得好像救生圈.

TRANSL.notes: There is a tree (trunk) over there; the child thinks the trunk is like a life buoy.

S.TRANSL: There is a tree over there; the child thinks the trunk is like a life buoy.

S.FORM: iza mlaziw tu nengiti mlaziwti ta qazqazan nani.
S.PHON: iz~ra mraz~riw tu nəŋiti mraz~riwti ta qaz~rqaz~ran nani.
S.FORM: iza mlaziw tu nengiti mlaziwti ta qazqazan nani.
S.PHON: iz~ra mraz~riw tu nəŋiti mraz~riwti ta qaz~rqaz~ran nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他覺得(這樣子)比較好過去到岸邊.

S.TRANSL: 他覺得 比較好過去到岸邊.

TRANSL.notes: It is easy (easier) to go to the shore.

S.TRANSL: It is easy to go to the shore.

S.FORM: titaanna yau biat 'nay takinilan muazmun tayan zinna nani.
S.PHON: titaanna jau βiat ʔnaj takiniran muaz~rmun tajan z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: titaanna yau biat 'nay takinilan muazmun tayan zinna nani.
S.PHON: titaanna jau βiat ʔnaj takiniran muaz~rmun tajan z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子看到那上面有青蛙,說:「有很多隻在那邊.」.
The child sees frogs on the trunk. He says, 'there are lots of frogs over there.'

S.FORM: wa mlilizaqti.
S.PHON: wa mririz~raqti.
S.FORM: wa mlilizaqti.
S.PHON: wa mririz~raqti.

TRANSL.notes: 喔,(小孩)好高興唷!

S.TRANSL: 喔, 好高興唷!
Wow! He is happy!

S.FORM: qeRasannati nani.
S.PHON: qəʁasannati nani.
S.FORM: qeRasannati nani.
S.PHON: qəʁasannati nani.
S.TRANSL: 就叫了.
He calls the frog.

S.FORM: azuti niquduanna nani alaannati usiq 'nay izaanna niquduanna masang o.
S.PHON: az~ruti niquɮuanna nani araannati usiq ʔnaj iz~raanna niquɮuanna masaŋ *.
S.FORM: azuti niquduanna nani alaannati usiq 'nay izaanna niquduanna masang o.
S.PHON: az~ruti niquɮuanna nani araannati usiq ʔnaj iz~raanna niquɮuanna masaŋ *.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子就拿了好像是他以前養的那一隻青蛙.
The child takes a frog, which seems to be the one he raised before.

S.FORM: yauisu tazian sayza zinna na sunis 'nay zinna ya na lazatna nani.
S.PHON: jauisu taz~rian sajz~ra z~rinna na sunis ʔnaj z~rinna ja na raz~ratna nani.
S.FORM: yauisu tazian sayza zinna na sunis 'nay zinna ya na lazatna nani.
S.PHON: jauisu taz~rian sajz~ra z~rinna na sunis ʔnaj z~rinna ja na raz~ratna nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩說:「原來你在這裡!」.
That child says, 'Here you are!'

S.FORM: alaannati na lazatna patanan lizaqan nani.
S.PHON: araannati na raz~ratna patanan riz~raqan nani.
S.FORM: alaannati na lazatna patanan lizaqan nani.
S.PHON: araannati na raz~ratna patanan riz~raqan nani.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙的主人把他拿回家,很高興.

TRANSL.notes: That person (child) takes the frog home and is happy.

S.TRANSL: That person takes the frog home and is happy.

S.FORM: qawiyatiimi zinna.
S.PHON: qawijatiimi z~rinna.
S.FORM: qawiyatiimi zinna.
S.PHON: qawijatiimi z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子說:「我們要走囉!」.
He says, 'We are leaving!'

S.FORM: nayau ma 'nay.
S.PHON: najau ma ʔnaj.
S.FORM: nayau ma 'nay.
S.PHON: najau ma ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣子.
That's all.

S.FORM: lizaqan nani.
S.PHON: riz~raqan nani.
S.FORM: lizaqan nani.
S.PHON: riz~raqan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們很高興.
They are happy.

S.FORM: mlizaqti maseq tu lepaw nani.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti masəq tu rəpaw nani.
S.FORM: mlizaqti maseq tu lepaw nani.
S.PHON: mriz~raqti masəq tu rəpaw nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們高高興興的回家.
They happily go home.

S.FORM: qanengiannati 'nay ni quduanna tu biat 'nay zinku nayau ma sikawmaanku.
S.PHON: qanəŋiannati ʔnaj ni quɮuanna tu βiat ʔnaj z~rinku najau ma sikawmaanku.
S.FORM: qanengiannati 'nay ni quduanna tu biat 'nay zinku nayau ma sikawmaanku.
S.PHON: qanəŋiannati ʔnaj ni quɮuanna tu βiat ʔnaj z~rinku najau ma sikawmaanku.

TRANSL.notes: 我想他會好好照顧那隻青蛙的.我說的(故事)就這樣子.

S.TRANSL: 我想他會好好照顧那隻青蛙的.我說的 就這樣子.
I think he will take care of the frog. That's all I want to say.
